channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Sowore slams seven-year jail term for man advertising cannabis online
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Omoyele Sowore criticizes the seven-year jail term for a Kano man advertising cannabis online, calling it “jungle justice” and urging judicial reform.
Read More: https://punchng.com/sowore-slams-seven-year-jail-term-for-man-advertising-cannabis-online/

item.title: Police nab cleaner for stealing NYSC doctor’s ₦18m car in Adamawa
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Adamawa police arrest a cleaner for stealing an NYSC doctor’s ₦18m car. The stolen vehicle was recovered in Kano. Investigations are ongoing.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-nab-cleaner-for-stealing-nysc-doctors-%e2%82%a618m-car-in-adamawa/

item.title: BREAKING: CBN retains interest rate at 26.5%
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria’s Central Bank (CBN) has retained its benchmark interest rate at 26.5% for the second consecutive time. Get the latest on CBN interest rate decisio
Read More: https://punchng.com/breaking-cbn-retains-interest-rate-at-26-5-2/

item.title: Throwback: I would rather stay at home than work for APC, says Fayose

item.description:
Despite previously stating he’d rather stay home than work for APC, former Ekiti Governor Ayodele Fayose has been appointed Chairman of the Rural Electrifi
Read More: https://punchng.com/throwback-i-would-rather-stay-at-home-than-work-for-apc-says-fayose/

item.title: NSCDC uncovers fake university in Lagos, rescues 106 students

item.description:
The NSCDC has uncovered a fake university operating in Lagos, rescuing 106 students lured by promises of foreign admission. Learn about the fraudulent sche

item.title: Celtic and Rangers charged by SFA over trouble after Scottish Cup game at Ibrox
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Rangers and Celtic have been hit with disciplinary charges over the trouble that followed their Scottish Cup clash at Ibrox.

item.title: IG urges newly promoted AIGs, CPs to shun corruption, abuse of power

item.description:
Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Disu, urges newly promoted AIGs and CPs to shun corruption and abuse of power, emphasizing integrity and accountabili
Read More: https://punchng.com/ig-urges-newly-promoted-aigs-cps-to-shun-corruption-abuse-of-power/

item.title: Release Gbajabiamila’s interrogation video on fake agency, Sowore tells ICPC
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Omoyele Sowore challenges ICPC to release the full, unedited video of Femi Gbajabiamila’s interrogation regarding the fake investment agency.
Read More: https://punchng.com/release-gbajabiamilas-interrogation-video-on-fake-agency-sowore-tells-icpc/

item.title: US invests $1.2m to preserve Nigeria’s cultural heritage
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The US has invested $1.2 million over five years to preserve Nigeria’s cultural heritage across 21 states, strengthening cooperation and combating illicit
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-invests-1-2m-to-preserve-nigerias-cultural-heritage/

item.title: Abacha’s regime marked by brutal repression, rights abuses, says ex-DSS operative
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A former DSS operative details the Abacha regime’s brutal repression, widespread human rights abuses, and political persecution in his new memoir.
Read More: https://punchng.com/abachas-regime-marked-by-brutal-repression-rights-abuses-says-ex-dss-operative/

item.title: Nigeria, Germany Hold High-Level Talks To Deepen Bilateral Relations
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Nigeria and Germany will hold high-level bilateral consultations on Wednesday as both countries seek to strengthen cooperation in trade, investment, renewable energy, security and other strategic sectors. The post Nigeria, Germany Hold High-Level Talks To Deepen Bilateral Relations appeared first on

item.title: Ex-Miss Universe Nigeria Chidimma Adetshina appears in S/African court to fight deportation
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Adetshina was arrested in June after Home Affairs alleged that she entered South Africa illegally and was later brought before court as the legal battle continues over possible deportation. The post Ex-Miss Universe Nigeria Chidimma Adetshina appears in S/African court to fight deportation appeared

item.title: Jonathan, Diri urge action after 70 years of oil exploration in Niger Delta

Former President Jonathan and Governor Diri call for urgent action and environmental justice in the Niger Delta after 70 years of oil exploration.

item.description: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June

item.title: The Switch 2 is $50 off at Woot for new customers
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Woot is celebrating its 22nd anniversary by rolling out a full week of sales, and one of them stands out for gamers looking to get a deal on Nintendo’s latest console. Normally $449.99, the Nintendo Switch 2 is $22 off for Woot customers who already have an account, or $50 off for new customers, whe

item.description: Businesses are deploying Artificial Intelligence to automate workflows, analyse data, write code, manage schedules and even complete tasks independently. The read more Top 10 AI productivity trends shaping work in 2026

item.title: Senate passes bill to rename NAICOM
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday passed a bill for the renaming of the National Insurance Commission, NAICOM as Insurance Regulatory Commission, IRC. The upper legislative chamber said the change to the new name is imperative against the backdrop that the former name is confusing, citing the history

item.title: Transfer:Club Brugge demand €10m for Onyedika
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Club Brugge are demanding €10 million for Super Eagles midfielder for Raphael Onyedika, DAILY POST reports. Bundesliga outfit, Eintracht Frankfurt submitted a bid for Onyedika last week, but  it was deemed insufficient by Club Brugge. The two clubs are, however, still in talks to reach an agree

item.title: Time to buy the dip in momentum stocks after a punishing July drawdown? Here’s what history tells us.

item.description: Investors who can stomach a little short-term volatility are often rewarded.

item.title: What could Burnham as PM mean for football?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Andy Burnham is only into his second day as the UK's Prime Minister, but already people are wondering what this could mean for sport.

item.title: Ukraine plunges into political crisis as anger over defence minister's dismissal grows
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Street protests were held for a fifth day on July 19 in Ukraine, over the firing of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Fedorov was dismissed following frequent clashes with top Army general Oleksandr Syrsky, sparking indignation particularly among young Ukrainians, who credit the tech-savvy 35-year

item.title: CBN Retains Interest Rate At 26.5% Amid Global Uncertainties
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has retained the Monetary Policy Rate (MPR), otherwise known as the benchmark interest rate, at 26.5 per cent, citing heightened global uncertainties and the need to sustain the gains recorded in the fight against inflation. The decision was announced on Tuesday by

item.title: Delta North: Nwoko to appeal court decision on Okowa’s candidacy
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Justice Mohammed Umar of the Federal High Court, Abuja, in a a judgement delivered on Monday, upheld the arguments of the defendants’ lawyers, including Kehinde Ogunwumiju, SAN, that Mr Nwoko’s suit was fundamentally defective and incompetent from its inception. The post Delta North: Nwoko to appeal

item.title: Ferguson says Keegan built Newcastle's greatest team
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson says Kevin Keegan "carried the love of the game on his sleeve" as he paid tribute to his former rival.

item.description: Football remains the world’s most-followed sport, attracting millions of supporters across domestic leagues, continental competitions, and international tournaments. Its year-round calendar creates constant excitement for fans who enjoy following teams, players, and evolving storylines. Alongs

item.title: Pastor sentenced to death for killing daughter over witchcraft claim
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The tragic incident occurred on February 15, 2025, when Deborah, who had Down syndrome, was killed after being branded a witch by her father. The case drew widespread condemnation from child rights advocates and organisations campaigning against witchcraft accusations and violence against children.

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Stocktwits’ Howard Lindzon talks to MarketWatch about sidestepping a chip selloff, where he sees opportunity and the “degenerate economy.”

item.title: Benue security adviser rescues alleged phone thief from lynching
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Special Adviser to Benue State Governor on Internal Security, Dr. Joseph Har, averted a tragic incident when he rescued an alleged phone thief from a lynching mob at Ugbokolo Street in the High-Level area of Makurdi, the Benue State capital. The suspect, identified simply as David (surname withh

item.title: 55-Year-Old Bauchi Community Leader Shot Dead
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Bauchi State Police Command has arrested a 40-year-old man, Clement Anthony, over the alleged killing of a community leader in Unguwar Ngas, Bauchi metropolis. Police said the suspect allegedly shot 55-year-old Jacob Bature, the Mai Anguwan Ngas, with a locally made single-barrel gun during an a

item.title: 5 ways to organise your wardrobe and drawers
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Most people find it very difficult to manage and maintain a properly organized wardrobe. When clothes are stacked in no particular order, drawers refuse to shut properly, and that favourite outfit is often nowhere to be found on the morning it is needed most. item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Ekiti State Police Command has arrested three suspects over the alleged theft and sale of stolen motorcycles, recovering seven motorcycles in separate operations across the state. The suspects are Mustapha Lekan, 38, from Osun State, who is accused of stealing motorcycles, and Blessing Adebiyi a

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Danladi Ya’u, Chairman of the African Democratic Congress, ADC in Gombe State, has officially resigned from the party and joined the Peoples Democratic Party, PDP ahead of the 2027 governorship election in the state. item.title: FG reopens 13 oil blocks for licensing
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Federal Government has announced that 13 of the 50 oil and gas blocks offered during the 2025 Licensing Round will be returned to the licensing pool after failing to attract investor bids. The post FG reopens 13 oil blocks for licensing appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch

Durosinmi only joined Pisa during the winter transfer window after impressing at Czech club Viktoria Plzeň. However, his move to Italy did not go as planned. The Nig

David Odunmbaku for transforming the council through Infrastructural projects and service delivery. The committee led by its chair

item.title: Kalshi Seeks Approval for Perpetual Futures Tied to Gold, Silver
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Kalshi Inc. is seeking approval to expand precious-metals trading on its platform with a popular type of derivative that never expires for gold, silver and platinum.

item.title: 2Baba finally speaks on viral romantic video with ex-wife, Annie Idibia
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Legendary Nigerian singer, 2Baba, has broken his silence over trending romantic video with ex-wife, Annie Idibia. DAILY POST reports that it was rumoured that the ex couple had reunited after a video showing the pair dancing together surfaced on social media. The speculation sparked mixed reactions

item.title: London’s 24-Hour Trading Is Unlikely to Revive Market, GAM Says
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The London Stock Exchange’s plan to introduce nearly 24-hour trading for equities may fall short of reviving the bourse’s fortunes, the head of GAM Investments’ global equities team said.

item.title: BREAKING: CBN retains interest rate at 26.5%
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has retained the Monetary Policy Rate (MPR), the country's benchmark interest rate, at 26.5 percent. The post BREAKING: CBN retains interest rate at 26.5% appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.title: Nicaragua President Daniel Ortega cancels election after two decades in power
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Nicaraguan President Daniel Ortega ruled out on Sunday any possibility of elections to prevent the opposition from taking office, after almost two decades in power. The post Nicaragua President Daniel Ortega cancels election after two decades in power appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Troops Neutralise Terrorist In Yobe, Recover Weapons
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Some of the items recovered include 25 rounds of belted PKT ammunition, one loaded AK-47 magazine, 15 empty PKT ammunition cases, assorted drugs, including paracetamol and nicotine products. The post Troops Neutralise Terrorist In Yobe, Recover Weapons appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Editorial: Osun must not vote in fear
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Sadly, this is not the first time politics has brought violence to Osun. The state has witnessed political clashes in the past, and many had hoped those dark days were over. It is painful that the same ugly pattern is returning. Elections should bring hope, not fear. They should unite people, not di

item.description: Artemisinin-based Combination Therapies (ACTs) are among the most commonly used medicines for treating uncomplicated malaria. The post 7 ways to spot counterfeit malaria medicines in Nigeria appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Indian Refiners Halt Iraq Oil Loadings as Hormuz Risks Escalate
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Two Indian state-run refiners have suspended crude oil loadings from Iraq as mounting security risks in the Strait of Hormuz make it increasingly difficult to ensure safety of vessels, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.title: Michael Okpara varsity clears air over recruitment controversy
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The clarification comes amid growing concerns from some of the affected personnel, who said they were recruited in February 2026 and had been working without pay since then, only to have their identity cards retrieved during a meeting with the university management last week. The post Michael Okpara

item.title: Keeper Martinez may 'step aside' from Argentina
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Argentina goalkeeper Emi Martinez says he is considering whether it is "time to step aside" from international football after his side's 1-0 defeat to Spain in the World Cup final.

item.description: Rank, an integrated financial services and wealth management platform, has launched three new community-powered financial services products – Money Circles, read more Rank targets Nigeria’s credit gap with zero-interest community lending platform

item.title: The wireless headset that gets hot-swappable batteries right
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: New gaming gear is always promising to shave milliseconds off latency or response time. The improvements usually aren't obvious. But the Glorious GHS InfinitePlay wireless headset, on the other hand, could save you far more than just milliseconds: It has the fastest hot-swap battery system I've ever

item.title: Nintendo keeps making shooters more friendly and approachable
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Nintendo does a lot of weird things, but Splatoon might just be one of the strangest - or at least the boldest. The series started as an attempt to muscle into the ultra-competitive online shooter space, but in a way that feels a world away from the violence and bombast of Call of Duty or […]

item.title: Halliday’s latest smart glasses feature a much-improved display
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: I first slipped on Halliday's original smart glasses at CES 2025. I was not a fan. The glasses had a tiny, movable display window embedded into the frame that was incredibly finicky to see, and my 30-minute demo left me with achy eyeballs. It was an interesting concept with terrible execution, espec

item.title: Hamilton tells himself to 'step it up' after Spa setbacks
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton says he needs to "step it up" at this weekend's Hungarian Grand Prix after admitting "can't afford" to repeat the crash that compromised his weekend in Belgium amid Ferrari's competitive form.

item.title: Nigeria 2027: Opposition takes its battle against Tinubu to Washington
item.dc:creator: The Africa Report
item.description: Makinde’s UN appeal and Atiku’s lobbying push revive a tactic used by the APC before its 2015 victory. But Tinubu is better equipped to fight back – and foreign pressure cannot make up for a weak coalition at home.

item.description: Hmmmmmmmmm.....STAND ALONE NARRATIVEFAMILY PATTERNPeople around me think I am nonchalant about relationship matters or Marriage, but one of the reasons I appear relaxed is because of the patterns I have noticed in my immediate and extended family. I have tried twice to break the pattern, but i

item.title: Baby trafficking ringleader jailed for 7 years
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: An Indonesian court has sentenced Lie Siu Luan to seven years in prison for leading a baby trafficking ring.

item.title: Fake images circulate of Spanish World Cup players draped in Palestinian flags
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: An image generated by artificial intelligence shows Spanish footballer Lamine Yamal celebrating his World Cup win while draped in a Palestinian flag. People have also been circulating an image of player Pedro Porro, who they falsely claim is wearing a Palestinian flag around his waist.

item.dc:creator: Tribune

item.title: Mexican drug lord ‘El Mayo’ sentenced to life in US prison
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Mexican drug lord ‘El Mayo’ sentenced to life in US prison

item.title: Messi, Mbappé, Others Headline Historic Records Set at 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: FIFA has released a list of the landmark records achieved during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with football stars Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappé and Cristiano Ronaldo among the players who rewrote the tournament’s history books. The global football governing body published the milestones on Tuesday,

item.title: Leadership Crisis Rocks Osun NURTW, NGO, Students Protest, Demand Police Intervention
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Yinka Kolawole in Osogbo Members of the National Union of Road Transport Workers (NURTW) yesterday staged protests across major motor parks in Osun State, passing a vote of no confidence in

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises As GM Surges On Earnings Report; Marvell, Micron, Sandisk Rally (Live Coverage)
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Short Sellers Ramp Up Bets Against HelloFresh’s Debut Bond
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Bets against HelloFresh SE’s debut bond, issued only three weeks ago, have surged after its trading got off to a rocky start earlier this month.

item.title: Stocks advance on tech strength; Mideast in focus
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: 2027: Ex-Gombe ADC Chairman Defects To PDP, Backs Pantami’s Governorship Bid
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former Chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) in Gombe State, Hon. Danladi Ya’u, has resigned from the party and defected to the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), declaring support for Professor Isa Ali Pantami’s governorship ambition ahead of the 2027 election. Ya’u, who

item.title: China elated over Cambodia’s firm position on One China Policy
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Chinese Government, has expressed delight over Cambodia's firm position on the One-China Policy. The post China elated over Cambodia’s firm position on One China Policy appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: What you should know about the Infinix HOT 70 Pro
item.dc:creator: TechCabal
item.description: The new phone brings 5G, a faster chipset, and a screen that changes color depending on the temperature.

item.title: Colombia, Peru Send Early Policy Signs to Extend Election Rally
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Investors are finding fresh reasons to buy Colombian and Peruvian assets as the countries’ newly elected presidents deliver early signals that their market-friendly agendas will translate into policy overhaul.

item.title: Club Brugge Place €10m Price Tag On Onyedika
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Club Brugge are demanding €10 million for Super Eagles midfielder Raphael Onyedika, Completesports.com reports. Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt submitted an offer for the Nigerian international last week, but the bid fell short of Club Brugge’s valuation. Despite the initial setback, negot

item.title: No Terror Will Reign In Nigeria, Says Oyedepo At Dreamland Dedication
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The founder of Living Faith Church Worldwide, Bishop David Oyedepo, has declared that terrorism will not prevail in Nigeria despite the country’s current security challenges, insisting that lasting peace can only come from God. Oyedepo made the declaration during the reordination of Pastor Kor

item.title: Zidane signs deal to become France Head Coach until 2030
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: French football legend Zinedine Zidane has reportedly signed a contract to become the next head coach of the France national team, with the deal set to run until June 2030. Transfer expert Fabrizio Romano disclosed the development in a post on Facebook on Tuesday, saying the former Real Madrid manag
